name: tmi-os-mathematical-board
description: A guarded Codex plugin for using the TMI-OS Engineering Surface as an LLM/GPT-Lean-TLFL-И1 system-development environment.

interface.shortDescription: Use the guarded И1 engineering surface as an LLM/GPT system-development interface.
interface.longDescription: TMI-OS Engineering Surface gives Codex a guarded local system-development environment for the first public И1 program: an LLM/GPT/Codex -> Lean -> TLFL -> И1 protocol with domain-order preservation, source, dependency chain, preview instructions, and leak checks.
defaultPrompt: Extend the И1 engineering surface without leaking private data.
